items.caption: A political campaign flyer for chris blake, who is running for the house of delegates in the 44th district. the flyer is designed with a green background and features a photo of chris blake and his wife. the text on the flyer highlights chris blake's qualifications, including his work as a teacher, his involvement in local organizations, and his commitment to supporting education and youth programs. the flyer also includes a call to action, encouraging viewers to vote for chris blake. the overall design of the flyer is professional and informative, with a clear focus on chris blake's qualifications and his commitment to serving the community.
